# Fixture provenance

- `pic1326145.jpg` — BoardGameGeek user-uploaded image (BGG image id
  1326145), found and added 2026-07-04. 4000x3000. Rights remain with
  the BGG uploader; kept here as test data for this project. Revisit
  licensing before any redistribution of this repository's fixtures.
  Labeled by hand (12 face-up cards). Notable content beyond the
  tableau: two face-down SET deck stacks (purple card backs) and
  players' arms — deliberate detection distractors.
